text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is filled with a strange, buzzing
energy, and the reason is simple. Apart from
Zenno Rob Roy and Special Week...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Air Groove and Fuji Kiseki are also joining the
fray. All have made a name for themselves in the
G1. The excitement is palpable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In contrast to her rivals, Eishin Flash's fire burns
quietly—after all, the more challenging the race,
the more worthwhile it is to compete in.
